chunks.text: 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Misc. Appeal No.172 of 2023 Zonal Manager, M/s. Sui Southern Gas Company Ltd................. Appellant. Versus Deedar Hussain.............................................................Respondent Civil Revision Application No.49 of 2024 Deedar Hussain...............................Applicant Versus Sui Southern Gas Company..................................................Respondent Mukesh Kumar, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Jamshed Qazi, advocate for the respondent No.1 along with Mr. M. Ashraf Chohan, advocate. Date of Hearing: 08.05.2025 Date of Order: 08.05.2025 O R D E R After hearing the matter at some length, both the learned counsel for the parties agree that instant appeal may be allowed and remanded back to the Gas Utility Court, District Thatta in the following terms: The plaintiff in the suit (respondent) shall be at liberty to amend the plaint as well as title within seven days from the date of this order. The Gas Utility Court is directed to decide the matter withinForty Five days after filing of the amended plaint and title of the suit after providing opportunity of hearing to both the parties. 2. Consequently, Civil Revision Application No.49 of 2024 has become infructuous, which is accordingly dismissed. Both the matters stand disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). JUDGE
